title: antrophyum latifolium var. obovatum
intro: Antrophyum latifolium var. obovatum, also known as the Obovate Antrophyum Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Pacific Islands, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating skin conditions and respiratory issues. The leaves of the Obovate Antrophyum Fern can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
